Bug / Task Description: Batches are flushed one item too late: a pending batch that has reached its configured size is not flushed until it exceeds that size by one, so emitted batches are larger than configured. A batch should be flushed exactly when it reaches the configured size. Fix the size check so reaching the configured batch size triggers a flush.
Commit Subject: fix(asyncbatch): flush as soon as a batch reaches the configured size
